  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation

  3. Methodendetails
    1. mutate(Chromosome)

Schnittstelle Mutation<T>

Typparameter:
T - The gene type used in the chromosome (e.g., Integer, Character).
Alle bekannten Implementierungsklassen:
BitFlipMutation, PointAndSubtreeMutation, PointMutation, SimpleMutation, SubtreeMutation, SudokuHybridMutation, SudokuSwapMutation, SwapMutation, UniformMutation
public interface Mutation<T>
Contract for inducing random genetic alterations into a given chromosome.

Mutation operators ensure population diversity and prevent the Genetic Algorithm from prematurely converging on local optima by randomly flipping, swapping, or rebuilding underlying gene structures.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Chromosome<T>
    mutate(Chromosome<T> chromosome)
    Applies a specific perturbation algorithm to the given chromosome.

  • Methodendetails

    • mutate

      Chromosome<T> mutate(Chromosome<T> chromosome)
      Applies a specific perturbation algorithm to the given chromosome.

      Constraint: The implementation must return a novel Chromosome instance or safely modify the underlying sequence such that valid data bounds (like preserving permutations in a TSP path) are not illegally violated based on the problem domain.

      Parameter:
      chromosome - The original chromosome targeted for mutation.
      Gibt zurück:
      The mutated chromosome (often a newly constructed instance to prevent state leakage).
